title: rhododendron neriiflorum var. euchaites
intro: Rhododendron neriiflorum var. euchaites is a lesser-known variety of rhododendron, a flowering plant in the heath family, characterized by its pinkish-red flowers and leathery leaves. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron neriiflorum var. euchaites include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron neriiflorum var. euchaites include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
